reviews.review_title: Best dragon game I have found yet, ideas
reviews.review_description: I love this game, I’m a true dragon lover. But I have some ideas! What if you were able to train the dragon outside as well. Like come with it outside!? And what if you could fly it when it got older and it could lay eggs or something?!? Please think about these ideas!?!?

Doesn't work I've uninstall Ed and 
reinstalled but there is nothing happening game loads and then nothing?? Am I missing something?

I HATCH DAH EGG DA DRAGON SO CUTE MUST PLAY



(Fix hand tracking bug and fix the play space it is quite buggy)

Yes, having to be hands-only instead of being able to use the controls is annoying. Yes, it glitches frequently and doesn't let you interact with your dragon properly. Yes, I also thought it was another broken app at first. But when it does work, its also really adorable. I bought two copies of this game. One for me and one for my aunt who loves dragons and has always wanted a pet dragon. Now, thanks to VR, she can. My dragon is an earth dragon named Scamper - and he comes to his name being called better than my real-life pets do! ;) If the developers keep working out the tracking bugs, this game could be a strong contender in the store because as of this review, I didn't see any other app like it.

developer_response.body:
Hey Ghotib, thanks so much for playing Eggy and taking the time to leave this insightful review. We really appreciate your support!

There's still quite a bit of additional polish to add to the experience, but we're happy to report our team have been making progress and will be releasing a brand new free summer update very soon. :)

If you'd like to find out more or offer your suggestions for future content you'd like to see in Eggy, please join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_title: another not working title at launch
reviews.review_description: artstyle, sound and atmosphere are promising... subtitles are unessesary annoying... maybe its better without just use the light to direct the costumer... but the worst part is... eggy is super laggy... the handtracking is super slow and needs seconds to react... it stops totally when i have to drop the egg in the nest... i couldnt do it and the egg sticks to my hand... i stopped the game there after 5 minutes... need to be fixed... i will come back in a few days...

developer_response.body:
Hi MrboGler, thank you for playing Eggy and taking the time to leave your feedback. We're sorry to hear it's not been an ideal experience for you and that you've encountered issues with the game's hand tracking. We're continuing to work on the game and will be providing future updates to ensure the best possible experience for players.

In the meantime, please consider playing again. If you play in a well-lit environment, the hand tracking should be accurate enough to easily interact with your dragon and all items in the game. Though if you run into issues again, please let us know.

The best way to get in touch is through our Discord server, which you can find here: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: Jeez, haters be hating. Yes, it’s a little buggy, but give it a chance. I thought the little dragon ( called mine Drago) is sooo cute!! Only suggestions… Cut the weird narration in half and if possible make the dragons size adjustable. It would be cool to have a little larger dragon, but that being said Devs don’t listen to the haters. Keep going!

developer_response.body:
Hey Kronkinator, thanks so much for playing Eggy and for a great review! We really appreciate your support and kind words - it can be challenging addressing negative reviews when our team has put a lot of effort into the game.

We want to make sure Eggy holds up to player's expectations and will be continuing to work on it, so that it's the best possible experience for anyone wanting to see what it's like to look after a dragon in their home.

Thanks for your feedback as well! If you'd like to share more thoughts about the game, you can speak directly with our team via our Discord Server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Hope to see you there and thanks again!

reviews.review_title: Want to love it, but buggy
reviews.review_description: The game is absolutely adorable and a lot of fun. Unfortunately, the hand controls aren't always responsive and it can be difficult to pull items out of the tablet and use the book. My dragon is no longer coming when called and I can't pick him up. Currently, I'm unable to open the book to see what to do next. Please provide a more in-depth tutorial. This can be a fantastic game without a little support and polish.

developer_response.body:
Hey HawkAdvocate, thank you for playing Eggy and taking the time to leave a review. Your feedback is greatly appreciated and we'll continue to work on the game to make sure it's a smoother experience for all players.

As for in-game tutorials, Eggy is best experienced in short bursts, as the game encourages you to visit each day and will teach you new gameplay concepts. We hope you return to visit your dragon again and find out more about the game.

If you have other suggestions, or would like to pass on any feedback directly to our team, please join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Thanks again for your review - it's much appreciated.

reviews.review_description:
Need a little more clear instructions on care..not just wisp will be back...ie. how to clean litterbox the little turds are seriously piling up, how to actually collect crystals, what are each of the little bubbles eggy produces, hunger sleep etc.   How exactly do you teach tricks like roll over etc? 

Jeez it has the attention span of a goldfish too, maybe keep it in your hand a little longer so you can actually clean it with the sponge. It hops over and immediately hops back down.

developer_response.body:
Hey Mommasaurs1, thanks for playing Eggy and taking time to leave your feedback. We will definitely pass this onto our development team, as we want to make sure it's easy to understand the gameplay of Eggy.

Most of those instructions appear on later days of the game - as you visit each day, you're guided by the Wisp on how to care for Eggy (e.g., cleaning up poop, collecting crystals, how to best care for your dragon). Be sure to check in daily and the game will guide you through how to play. :)

If you'd like to chat more about the game or would like to speak directly with our team, please join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

We hope to see you there! Thanks again for your review.

reviews.review_title: Virtual pet experience into a home real
reviews.review_description: Eggy brilliantly transforms the virtual pet experience into a home reality through its innovative use of mixed reality and hand-tracking technology, enhancing the feeling of having a virtual pet far beyond my expectations—all while weaving in a narrative. What truly astonished me was my initial belief that, as an adult, I would quickly lose interest in a game seemingly designed for a younger audience. Instead, I found myself logging in daily to ensure Eggy was content and to bond with my very own dragon. The impressive effort invested in the animations, the diverse interaction methods, the adorable sounds, and the engaging training process make it feel just like having an energetic puppy at home—only with more scales!

developer_response.body:
Hey TheVRRealm, thanks so much for playing Eggy and taking the time to leave a wonderful review! We really appreciate the support.

It's excellent to hear that Eggy kept you coming back to regularly check on your dragon. We designed the game to be enjoyed in short bursts, encouraging players to see how Eggy learns and progresses each day. Keep visiting and no doubt there will still be plenty more that you haven't seen just yet!

If you'd like to chat more about Eggy and pass on any feedback to the team, please feel free to join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Thanks again for the 5-star review!

reviews.review_description:
Spunge had a great idea with this game, and for the most part, it's done well. Yes it's a little buggy and reviewing this game during the pre-release period, I came across a lot of instances where there was no guidance on how to proceed. This left me figuring out what to do on my own. 

Beyond this, however, this game is quite a bit of fun. Clearly it's aimed at the youngest audience using VR, but the developers have created something that brings up the nostalgia of owning a tamagotchi for the older users, making this an enjoyable experience for all. 

Read the full review at dialog news dot ca

developer_response.body:
Hey Fa1coneri, thanks for taking the time to put together a detailed review for Eggy! While the game is initially quite open-ended, as you visit your dragon each day, you'll be given more instructions and introduced to more gameplay concepts slowly.

We're glad to hear you were able to enjoy the experience of interacting with your dragon, as well as the nostalgia of looking after a virtual pet. We'll be continuing to work on updates as well to make sure it works as smoothly as possible.

If you'd like to chat more about the game, it would be great to see you on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Thanks again for your review! :)

reviews.review_title: It's a good game for what it's worth.
reviews.review_description: It's fun to see your dragon grow. If it includes an expansion I just hope that we get extra dragon eggs to grow that our grown dragons can play with and teach things to each other. But there needs to be an easier way to summon the tablet. Like a hand clap to summon it cause grabbing air doesn't work sometimes.

developer_response.body:
Hey White Thunder, thanks so much for playing Eggy and leaving a great review for the game. We really appreciate your support! 🥰

We've got more updates on the way for Eggy, so your feedback means a lot and hopefully will be able to help us shape the experience. To chat with us more and keep across new content for Eggy, please join our Discord here: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Thanks again and we hope you enjoy seeing your dragon grow! 🐲

reviews.review_description:
This game is adorable! Yes it has a few little bugs, I am sure in time these will all be ironed out. It's hard to do this with people on various different quest horizon os updates. Some bugs will show where others don't get them. 

I give the game a 5 star as I can see its potential and can see myself enjoying this game myself even in the current state in which I've not really noticed anything wrong. 

Looking forward to what updates may come in the future. Hopefully a load of little virtual friends that interact with me and each other. 

My niece is going to love this game!

developer_response.body:
Hey Nath, thanks so much for checking out Eggy and taking the time to leave a wonderful review. As a small dev team, support like this goes a long way! 😀

We're glad to hear you've been able to enjoy the game with no issues interrupting your experience. We'll be continuing to work on future updates and patches to iron out any bugs.

If you have any feedback or simply want to chat with the dev team, please join the Spunge Games Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

We hope your niece enjoys looking after her own dragon too! 🐉

reviews.review_title: Like a Tamagotchi in your own home!
reviews.review_description:
Looking after virtual pets like Digimon and Tamagotchi was a big part of my childhood, so Eggy has me super nostalgic. The game works surprisingly well bringing a dragon into your own environment and using passthrough on the Quest 3/3S. Hand tracking does take a bit of getting used to, but feels far better than needing to use controllers to interact with the world.

If you're looking for a chill mixed reality experience, particularly one suited to younger players, then you should definitely give Eggy a go.

developer_response.body:
Hi Qualbert, thanks for playing Eggy and taking the time to leave a review! We're glad to hear that looking after a virtual dragon has got you feeling nostalgic. :) 

We'll be adding more updates in the future, so be sure to check back in each day to see how your dragon is going!

reviews.review_title: Only for this with big houses
reviews.review_description: I really don't want to refund but may have to as it's the only game that's complained about lack of room space.  So I haven't even got anywhere.  Such a disappointment.  :( don't bother unless you have a lot of space.  Needs to work in smaller areas or override options.

developer_response.body:
Hi Excitedpixels, thank you for taking the time to leave your feedback. We're sorry to hear the game hasn't been compatible with your space. You may have tried already, but if you could please try rescanning your environment, this may help. We do have limitations in terms of the play space we're able to work with, so hopefully this is something we're able to improve in future updates.

If you have any other feedback, please feel free to reach out to us on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description:
The written dialog refers to the singular quantity dragon as 'they' when it hatches and first starts out. When the egg hatched, I was at first wondering if I had more than one dragon...until it dawned on me that it was non-binary speak. There is no prompt to select your dragon's gender. Not a deal breaker, but it pulls you out of the experience.

The game itself is a bit buggy, like others are describing, but I haven't run into anything that makes it unplayable. I only felt the interest to play a short while after hatching, but my kids like going through the features of decorating the house with little activities and playing with the dragon and watching it wonder. Activities remind me of a Tamagochi, like giving it a batch, feeding it, playing with it, etc.

developer_response.body:
Hey ADDU2MYBONEYARD, thanks so much for playing Eggy and taking the time to leave a review with your feedback. We really appreciate it!

We definitely wanted to capture that same feeling of looking after a Tamagotchi when creating Eggy. Also great to hear that your kids are enjoying it too - the game has been made for all ages and is hopefully an opportunity for younger players to try out VR/mixed reality.

If you'd like to chat with more players and some of the team behind the game, please join us on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/J9xKanjN

Thanks again for the review!

reviews.review_description:
It's a fun little tamagachi/virtual pet type game/experience. I didn't get too far into it because as it's been mentioned. The hand tracking is pretty bad. I was in a well lit room with a fresh room scan. 
The tutorial subtitles got in the way of the directions on how to something/anything. 
It's small little things that add to the frustration..so devs work on that hand tracking. It's not user error as I've seen being suggested by them . Graphics look pretty good. A bit of clipping. Seems fun and life like actions. Just bad controls

developer_response.body:
Hey KillaTuck, thanks for playing Eggy and taking the time to leave a review. Your feedback helps us improve the game in future updates, so we really appreciate it!

Our team are already working on the next update, so hopefully we'll be able to improve a few of the issues you mentioned and get the hand tracking working as smoothly as possible.

If you'd like to chat directly with the dev team, please feel free to join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/J9xKanjN

Thanks again for your review. 🙂

reviews.review_description:
So disappointed, can’t even launch the game, as it says I don’t have enough play space. 
Every single other mixed reality that I own I am able to play with no issues.
I even re scanned. It’s an egg, why do I need 2M x 2M
Even Shattered puzzle game works in my play space.

Please fix this.

developer_response.body:
Hey GizmoDemi, thank you for bringing this to our attention. We want to make sure Eggy is as accessible as possible for all players, and while mixed reality does rely on your physical space, hopefully this is something we are able to fix for players with limited space available.

You may have tried already, but if you could please re-scan your environment, this may help the game recognise your play space. If this doesn't work, please get in touch with us for further suggestions. You can speak directly with our team via the Spunge Games Discord channel: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description:
Adults will too! But kids would absolutely adore it.

You raise a dragon from an egg to a rather chubby and slightly larger hatchling. You can feed it, clean it and play with it. It takes about a week to fully grow and every two days or so the next developmental cycle happens. Once fully grown you have the option to release the dragon out into the wild or keep it with you.

I was impressed by how good the hand tracking was. It has to be the best I have seen in a mixed reality game! You can also place decor around your irl home like night lights, candles or furniture. 

I didn't see any bugs or glitches myself tbh it was a clean run for me.

This game would be perfect as a birthday or Christmas gift for a little one!

developer_response.body:
Hey Jakeyjoe123, thanks so much for playing Eggy and leaving a great 5-star review! We really appreciate your support and kind words - it means a lot to our team. 😄

Awesome to hear that Eggy was a smooth experience for you and you enjoyed the variety of customisation and seeing your dragon grow over the course of the week. Eggy was definitely designed to be approachable for an audience of all ages, so hopefully more younger players can discover VR/mixed reality by playing it.

We'd love to chat more on our Discord server - we've got more updates for Eggy on the way and would be great to get your input: https://discord.gg/qJzWDgYZ

Thanks again for playing and for your review! 🐉

reviews.review_title: Most fun I've had in mixed reality
reviews.review_description: The game easily anaylized my room and I had a baby dragon interacting with my desk and space like it was really here. The technology is amazing and the gameplay and interactions with the dragon all are very natural and fun. 10/10 recommend

developer_response.body:
Hey AndresPlays93, thank you for playing Eggy and leaving an amazing 5-star review! We really appreciate it. :)

It definitely sounds like Eggy was able to capture the child-like joy of looking after a virtual pet. And it's even more surreal looking after your dragon in your very own environment too!

If you'd like to chat more about the game, or have suggestions on how we can make it even better, please feel free to join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

We hope to see you there!

reviews.review_description:
Eggy isn’t just a game—it’s a heartfelt journey that unfolds right in your living room. Through clever mixed reality magic, your home transforms into a living, breathing bridge between realms, where a fragile little dragon needs your love and guidance.

From the moment you find the mysterious egg, you’re hooked. The game’s gentle pacing and whimsical aesthetic make raising your dragon feel intimate and personal. The Book of Lore is a clever mechanic, letting you unlock spells, mix elemental teas, and even dance to connect with your dragon in surprisingly emotional ways.

But Eggy isn’t just about cute moments—there’s real weight to your decisions. Every choice, from what you feed your hatchling to how you train it, affects its eventual fate in the Dragon Realm. And yes, saying goodbye is bittersweet. I was a little sad about it, not going to lie. But that’s what makes the journey so powerful.

It’s part Tamagotchi, part fantasy adventure, and fully enchanting. Whether you're a kid or just a kid at heart, Eggy is a must-play for anyone who’s ever dreamed of raising a dragon.

At times there were some tracking issues, but that was from the lack of lighting. If you do come across issues, message the devs! Join their discord.

developer_response.body:
Hey TheGamingVeteran, thanks for leaving such a wonderful review for Eggy! We can definitely feel how much you've enjoyed looking after your very own dragon. 🥰

We wanted Eggy to be a combination of fun interaction with your dragon and also building an emotive connection. Sounds like it definitely hit the mark for you! 

We've got more updates on the way to help improve the experience, so hopefully even more players can have the best possible time with their dragon. Thanks again for your support and for playing!

reviews.review_description: A little more instructions would be nice.  Got this one first day and i hope there will be updates to polish it up ☺️ as is still glad I got it because it's so dang cute!!

developer_response.body:
Hey Kimberly, thanks so much for playing Eggy and taking the time to leave a 5-star review! It means a lot to us. ☺️

We've definitely got more updates planned and will be adding more content and polish to the game, so be sure to check in regularly.

To keep across the latest news for Eggy or to chat with our team, please join us on the Spunge Games Discord server: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

Thanks for your support!

reviews.review_title: Best pet experience in your own space
reviews.review_description: It is so much fun to raise an harmless pet dragon with glasses in your own space. I recommend this app for new comers in XR and anyone who enjoys having pet buddies in their space

developer_response.body:
Hey Shayor, thank you so much for the wonderful review! We really do appreciate it. 🙂 It's surreal to see a virtual pet in your own space - XR really does allow for experiences unlike any other!

We'd love to chat with you more on our Discord server and hear your thoughts on the game. You can join via this link: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

We hope you keep enjoying hanging out with your very own pet dragon!

reviews.review_description: I reserved this game for my son to play, he was really excited about it and it didn't work out.

developer_response.body:
Hey Eryck420, thanks for getting in touch. We're sorry to hear that Eggy didn't meet your son's expectations. Could you please let us know any specific areas where he encountered issues with the game? 

We want to ensure we continue to improve the experience for new players, as there's quite a bit of content that you only encounter by checking in on your dragon each day.

You can best get in touch with us via our Discord server, which you can join here: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_title: Well can’t get past yes your hands
reviews.review_description: Game looks cute but tho I DO have hands enabled, I cannot get past the hands message and grid of room-I have uninstalled and reinstalled and still won’t play.

developer_response.body:
Hey Kalmc, we're sorry to hear you're not able to get past the hands message at the start of Eggy. This could possibly be to do with the headset still recognising your controllers.

If you haven't already, try double tapping the controllers together, which should turn them off. If this doesn't work, please reach out at marketing@spungegames.com and we'll be happy to help, or you can join our Discord server to speak with us directly where we can troubleshoot the game for you: https://discord.gg/JPAgPApT

reviews.review_description: Everything I open the app I have to start over from the beginning it is not saving my game play.

developer_response.body:
Hi Miradabaddestbish247, thank you for playing Eggy. We've not encountered any issues yet regarding save data, so hopefully this is something we are able to help you with. When playing Eggy again, does the game keep your items in spots you've previously placed them? If not, please try uninstalling and reinstalling the game. You can also try re-scanning your room.

If neither of these options help, please get in touch with us on our Discord server and we'll be happy to help you troubleshoot: https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS

reviews.review_description: I can’t even play it. My hand tracking doesn’t work at all. I’m so disappointed

developer_response.body:
Hi Jesanda27, we're sorry to hear you've had issues with hand tracking. Could you please try uninstall and reinstall Eggy first? Please also make sure you're playing in a well let environment, so that the Quest 3/3S is able to easily recognise your hands.

If you're still having issues, please get in touch with us at info@spungegames.com or via the Spunge Games Discord server (https://discord.gg/GV3uSkmaxS) and our team will be more than happy to help you troubleshoot.

reviews.review_description: Daughter really enjoyed the experience.

developer_response.body:
Hey Draxyxx, thanks so much for checking out Eggy and leaving a 5-star review! We really do appreciate it. :)

We designed the game to be approachable to all younger players, so we're glad to hear your daughter has had a great time with it.

We'd love to hear your feedback and share more about the game with you - please join our Discord server here: https://discord.gg/qJzWDgYZ

Thanks again for reviewing Eggy! 🐲
